title: Make it Netherite!
description: A Texture pack to make usual Tools Look like Netherite.
body:
This Recource Pack adds Netherite-alike Textures for everyday Tools,
I made this so these Tools fit with the style of Netherite Tools.



Current textures:

![Current Items (1.0.7)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2006a361b41f113833493e2343c928b48f98d096.png)

Huge Credits to @OneFallenRose, for making more than half of the Textures!

- Mace
- Trident
- Fishing Rod
- Spyglass
- Carrot on a Stick
- Warped Fungus on a Stick
- Crossbow
- Bow
- Shield
- *Totem Of Undying
- *Bundle (uncolored)
- *Shulker Box (Uncolored/Purple)
- *Shulker Shell
- *Shulker Spawn Egg
- *Shears
- *Goat Horn
- *Brush
- *Flint & Steel
- *Flint
- *Bottle o' Enchanting

*= made by OneFallenRose
